title: Thai Sweet Potato Bake
description: A flavorful and creamy Thai-inspired sweet potato bake, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Boil the sweet potatoes until tender, about 15-20 minutes. Drain and set aside.
In a large bowl, whisk together the coconut milk, soy sauce, brown sugar, korean chili flakes, and garlic.
Add the diced new potatoes and bake potatoes to the bowl and stir to combine.
Add the cooked sweet potatoes to the bowl and stir until well coated.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and top with chopped green onions.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the filling is heated through.
Serve hot, garnished with additional green onions if desired.
